messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Three nights is a lot to carry — your body must be pretty worn out by now.

It's also past one in the morning, and I want to name that gently: this might be one of those moments where the screen is keeping you company when sleep is what you actually need.

What's been making it hard to settle?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

That's a heavy combination — job security and a strained relationship landing at the same time. Either one alone would be hard to sleep through.

What's sitting heavier right now — the work piece, or the silence with Renee?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

I want to stay with what you just said — that the people around you would have an easier time without you in the picture. That's a painful place to be, and it matters that you said it.

I have to ask you directly: are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of harming yourself?

I'm an AI, and something this heavy deserves more than I can hold alone. If you're in that place, please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. They're there right now.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and I'll get there with you — but I don't want to move past what you said too quickly, because it mattered.

Before we map the week: are you having thoughts of hurting yourself, or of not wanting to be here? I'm still asking directly, because I care about the answer.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I hear you, and we'll get to the schedule — I promise it's not going anywhere.

But I need to stay with my question for just a moment: are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of hurting yourself? A straight answer, even a quick one, helps me know how you're doing right now.
